activities.name: Copying Product data from SQL DB to ADLS
ForEach to copy product and customer

items.value:
@createArray('SELECT * FROM SalesLT.Product WHERE ProductID > 100',
'SELECT * FROM SalesLT.Customer WHERE CustomerID > 100 AND CustomerID < 1000')

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS RecordCount FROM SalesLT.Customer

activities.name: If Condition for Customer Record Count

properties.description: Create a pipeline that first checks whether the Customer.csv file is available in the folder location. If it is available it will copy the file data to the Customer Table.

activities.name: If Condition to check item name Customer
Get list of all files in ADLS folder

properties.description: Create a pipeline that will create the incremental pipeline using the table instead of HighWaterMark File.

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT HW_DATE AS 'datefromHW' FROM  [dbo].[Highwatermark] where HW_Tablename = 'Customer'
select max(modifieddate) as lastmodifiedon from saleslt.customer

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select * from saleslt.customer
where modifieddate > '@{activity('Lookup Highwatermark date').output.firstRow.datefromHW}' and modifieddate <= '@{activity('Lookup Customer last modifiedon date').output.firstRow.lastmodifiedon}'

activities.name: Updating the High Watermark table
activities.description: Updating the High Watermark table to the max modified on date in the customer table

text.value:
UPDATE dbo.Highwatermark
SET HW_DATE = '@{activity('Lookup Customer last modifiedon date').output.firstRow.lastmodifiedon}'

activities.name: Copy Customer Data from DB to ADLS
Copy Customer and their address to ADLS

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT a.CustomerID, a.FirstName, a.LastName, b.AddressID, c.Addressline1, c.Addressline2, c.city,c.StateProvince, c.CountryRegion FROM [SalesLT].[Customer] a
inner join [SalesLT].[CustomerAddress] b
ON a.CustomerID = b.CustomerID
inner join [SalesLT].[Address] c
ON b.AddressID = c.AddressID

activities.name: Get Product Count
activities.description: Copy data when the number of records is greater than 10 in product table

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS recordcount FROM saleslt.Product

ifTrueActivities.description: Copy data from SQL DB to ADLS JSON when record count is greater than 10

properties.description:
Create a pipeline to copy the customer data from csv file to SQL table which has only 3 columns. While copying the data, ensure that copy all the rows where custid is odd number. Also check if cust id exist in table then update it.  

File attached with question.
Table: Create dummy table with column (CID, Name, mailid)
Insert dummy row with id 1,3,5,7,9,8,10

Create a pipeline to read the Customer table data from SQL and CustomerAddress data from CSV, join both of them,
and then save the result where customer id> 1000 & Customer id <2000 in ascending order as a Parquet file.
